title: Bulk Deleting Data Within A Column
excerpt: It would be tremendously helpful if there was a way to bulk delete data across different cells.  I am not looking to delete everything in each row, rather delete all the data in each column. I am not interested in comple…

posts.author: deesocialmedia (Deanna)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be tremendously helpful if there was a way to bulk delete data across different cells. I am not looking to delete everything in each row, rather delete all the data in each column. I am not interested in completely deleting each column, just the data within the columns.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Deanna,

Does our batch actions feature help you achieve this? This feature allows you to bulk select items to delete data within each column - the column doesn’t delete, it’s just the data as you said. Let me know

posts.author: deesocialmedia (Deanna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thanks for getting back! Unfortunately not as I am not looking to delete a whole row or column, just specific cells within each row/column.

posts.author: weblytica.com (Andy O'Neil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Deanna,

This could be done outside of Monday using Make.com. I have recorded a video where I update columns of a board, but they could as easily be updated to a {{null}} (blank) value as well. https://youtu.be/NGLK_H5D9BA?t=370&si=MbMZwZZzHo8tXUPH

I hope you find this video valuable!

If you seek assistance with this, please let me know I would be happy to help!
